title: bet-service 100% error rate after connection-pool saturation
symptoms: 100% bet placement failures|nodes unresponsive|connection pool exhausted
root_cause: Connection pool exhaustion caused by retry storm against wallet dependency
resolution: Disabled retry fan-out, restarted bet-service pool, validated wallet latency, monitored bet placement success
lessons_learned: Gate retries with circuit breaker and alert on pool saturation before node exhaustion
